testcase.name: getCertificateByEnrollment_shouldReturnCertificate

url='jdbc:h2:mem:72005029-3ecf-4c23-b51b-1ec40bedd2fa;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=false', username='sa' 2026-04-16T23:03:01.079+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-04-16T23:03:02.350+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists certificates cascade Hibernate: create table certificates ( completion_date timestamp(6), course_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, enrollment_id bigint not null unique, id bigint generated by default as identity, issued_at timestamp(6), student_id bigint not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, status varchar(20) not null check (status in ('PENDING','GENERATING','ISSUED','FAILED')), certificate_number varchar(50) not null unique, course_title varchar(200), student_name varchar(200), failure_reason varchar(500), pdf_url varchar(500), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create index idx_certificates_student_id on certificates (student_id) Hibernate: create index idx_certificates_status on certificates (status) 2026-04-16T23:03:02.403+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-04-16T23:03:02.813+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c1_0.enrollment_id=? testcase.name: generateCertificate_shouldBeIdempotent
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T23:03:03.106+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c.e.c.service.CertificateService : Generating certificate for enrollment 1, student 100 Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.certificate_number, c1_0.completion_date, c1_0.course_id, c1_0.course_title, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.enrollment_id, c1_0.failure_reason, c1_0.issued_at, c1_0.pdf_url, c1_0.status, c1_0.student_id, c1_0.student_name, c1_0.updated_at from certificates c1_0 where c1_0.enrollment_id=? Hibernate: insert into certificates (certificate_number, completion_date, course_id, course_title, created_at, enrollment_id, failure_reason, issued_at, pdf_url, status, student_id, student_name, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-16T23:03:03.110+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c.e.c.service.CertificateService : Certificate 2 created with PENDING status 2026-04-16T23:03:03.112+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c.e.c.service.CertificateService : Certificate CERT-2026-328240 issued for enrollment 1 2026-04-16T23:03:03.112+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c.e.c.service.CertificateService : Generating certificate for enrollment 1, student 100 Hibernate: update certificates set certificate_number=?, completion_date=?, course_id=?, course_title=?, enrollment_id=?, failure_reason=?, issued_at=?, pdf_url=?, status=?, student_id=?, student_name=?, updated_at=? where id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.certificate_number, c1_0.completion_date, c1_0.course_id, c1_0.course_title, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.enrollment_id, c1_0.failure_reason, c1_0.issued_at, c1_0.pdf_url, c1_0.status, c1_0.student_id, c1_0.student_name, c1_0.updated_at from certificates c1_0 where c1_0.enrollment_id=? 2026-04-16T23:03:03.117+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c.e.c.service.CertificateService : Certificate already exists for enrollment 1, returning existing

testcase.name: getCertificatesByStudent_shouldReturnList

testcase.name: generateCertificate_shouldCreateCertAndGenerateNumber
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T23:03:03.146+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c.e.c.service.CertificateService : Generating certificate for enrollment 1, student 100 Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.certificate_number, c1_0.completion_date, c1_0.course_id, c1_0.course_title, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.enrollment_id, c1_0.failure_reason, c1_0.issued_at, c1_0.pdf_url, c1_0.status, c1_0.student_id, c1_0.student_name, c1_0.updated_at from certificates c1_0 where c1_0.enrollment_id=? Hibernate: insert into certificates (certificate_number, completion_date, course_id, course_title, created_at, enrollment_id, failure_reason, issued_at, pdf_url, status, student_id, student_name, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-04-16T23:03:03.152+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c.e.c.service.CertificateService : Certificate 5 created with PENDING status 2026-04-16T23:03:03.153+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c.e.c.service.CertificateService : Certificate CERT-2026-361646 issued for enrollment 1

testcase.name: verifyCertificate_shouldFindByNumber
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T23:03:03.159+01:00 INFO 29952 --- [certificate-service] [ main] c.e.c.service.CertificateService : Generating certificate for enrollment 1, student 100 Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.certificate_number, c1_0.completion_date, c1_0.course_id, c1_0.course_title, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.enrollment_id, c1_0.failure_reason, c1_0.issued_at, c1_0.pdf_url, c1_0.status, c1_0.student_id, c1_0.student_name, c1_0.updated_at from certificates c1_0 where c1_0.enrollment_id=? Hibernate: select c1_0.id, c1_0.certificate_number, c1_0.completion_date, c1_0.course_id, c1_0.course_title, c1_0.created_at, c1_0.enrollment_id, c1_0.failure_reason, c1_0.issued_at, c1_0.pdf_url, c1_0.status, c1_0.student_id, c1_0.student_name, c1_0.updated_at from certificates c1_0 where c1_0.certificate_number=?
